message:
test(caam): add comprehensive tests for account and rotation modules

Adds 33 tests covering:
- Profile CRUD operations (create, get, list, update, delete)
- Profile status management (cooldown, verification, activation)
- BYOA status queries
- Pool management and profile retrieval
- Rotation strategies and rate limit handling
- Rate limit error detection for all providers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
